data.content: Plan complete for `loom update` subcommand. Key decisions: use `ureq` (blocking HTTP client) + `sha2`/`flate2`/`tar` crates. Leverage GitHub's smart redirect URL (`/releases/latest/download/`) to avoid API rate limits. Parse version from redirect Location header for version comparison. Atomic binary replacement via rename. Supports `--check` (dry run) and `--force` flags. See plan note for full file change list and test strategy.
